name: Henwood Busing

districts_or_customers: Likely Western Wayne SD or Wayne Highlands SD area (Lake Ariel, Wayne County, NE PA); not confirmed
recent_news: No notable M&A or news found. Operates under FMCSA DOT #2171946 as 'Henwood Bussing' carrier out of Lake Ariel, PA.

name: Harlows Bus Co
owner_or_parent: Harlow's School Bus Service, Inc. (parent company; the Custer/Hill City SD address is a branch location of this multi-state operator)
fleet_size_est: Branch: ~6-20 buses (Hill City SD contract); parent Harlow's School Bus Service operates ~26 locations across ID/MT/ND/SD/WA/NE with contracts ranging 6 to 100+ routes each
employees_est: 2 at this branch record; parent company is significantly larger (multi-hundred employees across all locations)
districts_or_customers: Hill City School District 51-2 (SD); parent serves ~30 districts across 6 states (ID, MT, ND, SD, WA, NE)
recent_news: No M&A news found; Harlow's School Bus Service appears to remain independent and family-controlled, founded 1973 by Harlow Hageness. Affiliated with Harlow's Bus & Truck Sales (dealer network).
fit_notes: IMPORTANT: 'Harlows Bus Co' at this Custer SD address is NOT a standalone single-bus operator — it is a branch of Harlow's School Bus Service, a significant family-owned multi-state regional contractor (~26 locations across 6 western states, founded 1973). Parent is a TIER-1 PLATFORM-SCALE acquisition candidate, not a typical tuck-in. Highly attractive: family-owned, decades-old, multi-state scale, affiliated bus dealership (Harlow's Bus & Truck Sales), succession likely a factor given founder age. Should be elevated to platform/major-add target list, not tuck-in.

Not a meaningful tuck-in unless Summit specifically wants entry to the NYC private-school van/bus market.

Maria Sonaly Caro (current principal of School Bus Safety City Inc.)

Even if 'Fabiana Safety Transportation' is a historical/sister entity, this is a training services business, outside Summit's operating-contractor acquisition thesis. EXCLUDE from target list.
